dialogue-root-trader-choice: Do you know any other traders around?
dialogue-root-rumor-choice: Have you heard any rumors lately?
dialogue-trader-intro: One of my colleagues may be stationed nearby. I can mark their location on your map, for a price.
dialogue-trader-success: There. I've marked my colleague's location on your map.
dialogue-trader-searching: Give me a moment. I need to think about who might still be operating nearby. Ask me again shortly.
dialogue-trader-quota: That's everyone I know how to reach.
dialogue-trader-nofunds: Come back when you can afford the information.
dialogue-trader-failed: I don't know of any other traders I can point you toward. Sorry.
dialogue-rumor-intro: Certainly. But useful information has a price.
dialogue-rumor-approximate-pay: I'll pay for whatever you've heard.
dialogue-rumor-betterruins-pay: I'll pay for the location of one of those richer old ruins.
dialogue-rumor-approximate-success: I've marked the general area on your map. You'll have to do some searching yourself.
dialogue-rumor-exact-success: I've marked the exact location. Try not to get yourself killed.
dialogue-rumor-betterruins-success: I know a particularly promising ruin. I've marked its exact location on your map.
dialogue-rumor-translocator-success: I know the location of an unrepaired ancient translocator. I've marked it precisely on your map.
dialogue-rumor-searching: That kind of information takes time. Ask me again in a moment.
dialogue-rumor-nofunds: Useful information is not free. Come back when you can pay.
dialogue-rumor-failed: I don't have anything useful for you right now.
offer-general-approximate-description: An imprecise location for an interesting place.
offer-general-exact-description: The exact location of an interesting place.
offer-trader-description: The exact location of the closest unknown trader known by this seller.
message-general-disabled: General rumors are disabled in the configuration.
message-approximate-disabled: Approximate rumors are disabled in the configuration.
message-exact-disabled: Exact rumors are disabled in the configuration.
message-translocator-disabled: Translocator rumors are disabled in the configuration.
